Title: Mini Shai-Hulud Strikes Again: 317 npm Packages Compromised
Description: A compromised npm maintainer account published 637 malicious versions across 317 packages including size-sensor, echarts-for-react, timeago.js, and hundreds of @antv scoped packages, affecting 15M+ monthly downloads.

Title: Nobody Pushed Back: Why Engineers Stay Silent Until It's Too Late
Description: Nokia, TSB, Boeing, Microsoft — four companies, four disasters, one pattern. The engineers knew. They just didn't speak up. Here's why, and what it costs when nobody pushes back.
